title: lolium temulentum f. arvense
intro: Lolium temulentum f. arvense, also known as false cheatgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Lolium genus and is often confused with Lolium temulentum, but is actually a distinct species. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Lolium temulentum f. arvense include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Lolium temulentum f. arvense can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues.
